creator: yuri@freebsd.org
text:
Currently python ports can be built in different flavors using different versions of python. So the port py-xxx will become the package named ex. py27-xxx or py34-xxx. While this in itself is a hack, I am sure that framework will choke on the python port names without py- prefix in this regard.

This should really be fixed in the framework, but for the time being it is better to follow this convention for port names.
